steps.title: Substitute the input
steps.content:
Replace $x$ with $21$ in the function:
$$
g(21)=\frac{4}{7}(21)-\frac{5}{7}
$$

steps.title: Simplify the value
steps.content: Compute the expression: $$ g(21)=12-\frac{5}{7} $$ $$ g(21)=\frac{84}{7}-\frac{5}{7} $$ $$ g(21)=\frac{79}{7} $$ The answer is C.
